services/cars-service/src/main/java/za/c.general_idea: Add @Service annotation to the interface to align with Spring Boot microservice architecture.
Fix missing space after comma in method signature for code style consistency.
Remove trailing empty line at the end of the file.
Annotate the service implementation with @Service to enable Spring component scanning and dependency injection.
Replace constructor-injected list with a static constant list to centralize data storage.
Remove the constructor that previously accepted the list of cars, as the data source is now static.
Use Objects.equals for comparing Integer year to handle potential null values safely.
Reformat the searchCars method signature and body for better readability.
services/cars-service/src/main/java/za/c.human_impl:
public List<Car> searchCars(String make, String model, Integer year, String color, String engine, String transmission,
                                String fuelType, Integer mileage, Integer ownerId, Integer minimumPrice, Integer maximumPrice)

services/reservations-service/src/main/j.general_idea: Annotate the implementation class with @Service to register it as a Spring-managed bean.
Remove the constructor and field that previously held the reservation list, as the data source is changing.
Replace the injected list with a static list from a Constant utility class for data persistence.

services/users-service/src/main/java/za/.general_idea: Annotate the service implementation with @Service to register it as a Spring-managed bean.
Replace constructor-based dependency injection with a static field from a utility class to manage the user list.

services/cars-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the Maven parent from a custom project structure to spring-boot-starter-parent to inherit Spring Boot dependency management and build defaults.
Updated Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 21 to match the target runtime environment.
Added spring-boot-starter-web dependency to enable RESTful web service capabilities.
Added spring-boot-starter-test dependency to support unit and integration testing with Spring Boot.
Added explicit spring-web dependency, likely to ensure specific web module classes are available or to override managed versions.
Added spring-boot-maven-plugin to the build section to enable repackaging the application as an executable JAR.
